title: Your First Program
knowledge_note: The word 'algorithm' comes from Al-Khwarizmi, a 9th-century Muslim mathematician from Baghdad who wrote the first algebra textbook. Every program you write follows his work.
explanation: The simplest thing ILMA can do is show words on screen. The keyword 'say' does this — like speaking out loud. Write it, then the words in quotes, and your program speaks.
challenge: Change the program to say your own name.
hint: Change "Amira" to your name inside the quotation marks.
